mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensitive_words (word, category, status, created_at) VALUES (#{word}, #{category}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensitive_words WHERE word = #{word}
mapper.update: UPDATE sensitive_words SET word = #{word}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sensitive_words SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sensitive_words (word, category, status, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.word}, #{item.category}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT word FROM sensitive_words WHERE status = 1
